let f : ℚ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := fun m => ((2 - 2 * m) / -(m + 1)^2, (2 * m + 2) / -(m - 1)^2, (1 - m^2) / 4)
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (s := f '' (Set.Ioi 1))
  · rintro _ ⟨m, hm, rfl⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    have h1 : m + 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith
    have h2 : m - 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith
    have h3 : (m + 1)^2 ≠ 0 := pow_ne_zero 2 h1
    have h4 : (m - 1)^2 ≠ 0 := pow_ne_zero 2 h2
    have h5 : m^2 + 3 ≠ 0 := by linarith [pow_two_nonneg m]
    let x := (2 - 2 * m) / -(m + 1)^2
    let y := (2 * m + 2) / -(m - 1)^2
    let z := (1 - m^2) / 4
    have hx1 : x - 1 = -(m^2 + 3) / (m + 1)^2 := by field_simp [x]; ring
    have hy1 : y - 1 = -(m^2 + 3) / (m - 1)^2 := by field_simp [y]; ring
    have hz1 : z - 1 = -(m^2 + 3) / 4 := by field_simp [z]; ring
    refine ⟨x, y, z, ⟨⟨by rw [hx1]; simp [h5, h3], by rw [hy1]; simp [h5, h4], by rw [hz1]; simp [h5]⟩, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩⟩
    · field_simp [x, y, z, h1, h2]; ring
    · field_simp [hx1, hy1, hz1, x, y, z, h1, h2, h5]; ring
  · apply Set.Infinite.image _ (Set.infinite_Ioi 1)
    intro m1 hm1 m2 hm2 h
    have : (1 - m1^2) / 4 = (1 - m2^2) / 4 := by injection h with h1 h2 h3; exact h3
    have : m1^2 = m2^2 := by linarith
    exact (pow_left_inj (by linarith) (by linarith) 2).1 this

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := fun n =>
    let q : ℚ := n + 1
    (-(q + 1) / q ^ 2, -(q ^ 2 + q), q / (q + 1) ^ 2)
  have hf : ∀ n, f n ∈ {p | ∃ x y z, ∃ (_ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) (_ : x * y * z = 1) (_ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1), (x, y, z) = p} := by
    intro n
    let q : ℚ := n + 1
    let x : ℚ := -(q + 1) / q ^ 2
    let y : ℚ := -(q ^ 2 + q)
    let z : ℚ := q / (q + 1) ^ 2
    have hq : q ≥ 1 := by norm_cast; exact n.zero_le.add_one
    have hq0 : q ≠ 0 := by linarith
    have hq1 : q + 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith
    have hx : x ≠ 1 := by dsimp [x]; field_simp; nlinarith
    have hy : y ≠ 1 := by dsimp [y]; nlinarith
    have hz : z ≠ 1 := by dsimp [z]; field_simp; nlinarith
    refine ⟨x, y, z, ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
    · dsimp [x, y, z]; field_simp; ring
    · dsimp [x, y, z]; field_simp [hx, hy, hz, hq0, hq1]; ring
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (Set.range_subset_iff.mpr hf)
  apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
  intro n m h
  injection h with hx hyz
  injection hyz with hy hz
  dsimp [f] at hy
  have hq : (n + 1 : ℚ) ^ 2 + (n + 1 : ℚ) = (m + 1 : ℚ) ^ 2 + (m + 1 : ℚ) := by linarith [hy]
  norm_cast at hq
  nlinarith

  apply Set.Infinite.mono (Set.range_subset_iff.mpr (fun n => ?_))

  · let x := -(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) ^ 2; let y := (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2) ^ 2; let z := -((n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2))
    have h1 : (n + 1 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by norm_cast; simp; have h2 : (n + 2 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by norm_cast; simp
    have hnz : (n : ℚ)^2 + 3*n + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have ha : x / (x - 1) = (n + 2 : ℚ) / (n ^ 2 + 3 * n + 3) := by rw [x]; field_simp [h1]; ring
    have hb : y / (y - 1) = -(n + 1 : ℚ) / (n ^ 2 + 3 * n + 3) := by rw [y]; field_simp [h2]; ring
    have hc : z / (z - 1) = (n ^ 2 + 3 * n + 2 : ℚ) / (n ^ 2 + 3 * n + 3) := by rw [z]; field_simp; ring
    refine ⟨x, y, z, ⟨⟨by rw [x]; intro h; field_simp [h1] at h; nlinarith,
      by rw [y]; intro h; field_simp [h2] at h; nlinarith,
      by rw [z]; intro h; nlinarith⟩,

    ((1 - (n + 2 : ℚ)^2) / 4, -2 * (n + 3 : ℚ) / (n + 1 : ℚ)^2, 2 * (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 3 : ℚ)^2)
  refine Set.Infinite.mono (Set.range_subset_iff.mpr fun n => ?_) (Set.infinite_range_of_injective fun n m h => ?_)
  · have : (n : ℚ) + 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith

let f : ℚ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := λ m => (-2 * (m + 1) / (m - 1) ^ 2, (1 - m ^ 2) / 4, 2 * (m - 1) / (m + 1) ^ 2)
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (s := f '' { m | 1 < m })
  · rintro _ ⟨m, hm, rfl⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    have h1 : m - 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith [hm]
    have h2 : m + 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith [hm]
    have hx : -2 * (m + 1) / (m - 1) ^ 2 ≠ 1 := by field_simp; nlinarith
    have hy : (1 - m ^ 2) / 4 ≠ 1 := by field_simp; nlinarith
    have hz : 2 * (m - 1) / (m + 1) ^ 2 ≠ 1 := by field_simp; nlinarith

    field_simp [h1, h2, hx, hy, hz]; ring
  · apply Set.Infinite.image (Set.infinite_Ioi 1)
    intro m1 hm1 m2 hm2 hf
    simp only [Set.mem_Ioi] at hm1 hm2
    injection hf with hx hyhz
    injection hyhz with hy hz
    have : m1 ^ 2 = m2 ^ 2 := by linarith [hy]
    have := sq_eq_sq.mp this
    rcases this with h | h
    · exact h
    · linarith

    have hz1 : z-1 = -(m^2+3)/(m+1)^2 := by dsimp [z]; field_simp [hm.2]; ring

      by rw [←sub_ne_zero, hz1]; nlinarith [hm.2]⟩, by dsimp [x,y,z]; field_simp [hm.1, hm.2]; ring,
      by field_simp [hx1, hy1, hz1, hm.1, hm.2]; ring, rfl⟩
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (Set.image_subset_iff.mpr hf)
  apply Set.Infinite.image (Set.infinite_univ.diff (by simp : Set.Finite {1, -1}))
  intro m1 hm1 m2 hm2 heq
  injection heq with hx hy hz
  have : m1^2 = m2^2 := by linarith [hx]
  cases' eq_or_eq_neg m1 m2 with hpos hneg; · exact hpos
  subst hneg; field_simp [hm1.1, hm1.2] at hy; nlinarith [hy]

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := fun n =>
    (-(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) ^ 2, -((n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2)), (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2) ^ 2)

    intro n m h; simp [f] at h; have h2 := h.2.1

  have ht1 : t + 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith [Nat.cast_nonneg n]
  have hD : t ^ 2 + t + 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
  use -(t + 1) / t ^ 2, -(t * (t + 1)), t / (t + 1) ^ 2
  refine ⟨⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
  · field_simp; nlinarith
  · nlinarith
  · field_simp; nlinarith
  · field_simp; ring
  · field_simp [hD]; ring

let f (n : ℕ) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ :=
    let nq : ℚ := n + 1
    (-nq * (nq + 1), nq / (nq + 1)^2, -(nq + 1) / nq^2)
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (Set.range_subset_iff.mpr ?)
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro n m h; simp [f] at h; nlinarith
  · intro n
    let nq : ℚ := n + 1
    have hq : 0 < nq := by norm_cast; simp
    have hq1 : 0 < nq + 1 := by linarith
    have hq2 : 0 < nq^2 + nq + 1 := by nlinarith
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    use (f n).1, (f n).2.1, (f n).2.2
    repeat constructor
    · nlinarith
    · field_simp; nlinarith
    · field_simp; nlinarith
    · field_simp [hq.ne', hq1.ne']; ring
    · field_simp [hq.ne', hq1.ne', hq2.ne']; ring
    · rfl

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := λ n => (-(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) ^ 2, -(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2), (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2) ^ 2)
  have h_inj : Function.Injective f := by
    intro n m h
    simp [f] at h
    have h1 : (n : ℚ)^2 + 3 * n + 2 = (m : ℚ)^2 + 3 * m + 2 := by linarith [h.2.1]
    have h2 : (n : ℚ) = (m : ℚ) := by
      nlinarith [show 0 ≤ (n : ℚ) from n.cast_nonneg, show 0 ≤ (m : ℚ) from m.cast_nonneg]
    exact Nat.cast_inj.mp h2
  refine Set.Infinite.mono (Set.range_subset_iff.mpr ?_) (Set.infinite_range_of_injective h_inj)
  intro n
  let x : ℚ := -(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) ^ 2
  let y : ℚ := -(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2)
  let z : ℚ := (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2) ^ 2
  have h1 : (n + 1 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by linarith [show 0 ≤ (n : ℚ) from n.cast_nonneg]
  have h2 : (n + 2 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by linarith [show 0 ≤ (n : ℚ) from n.cast_nonneg]
  have hD : (n : ℚ) ^ 2 + 3 * n + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith [show 0 ≤ (n : ℚ) from n.cast_nonneg]
  refine ⟨x, y, z, ⟨⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩⟩
  · intro h; field_simp [x] at h; nlinarith [show 0 ≤ (n : ℚ) from n.cast_nonneg]
  · intro h; field_simp [y] at h; nlinarith [show 0 ≤ (n : ℚ) from n.cast_nonneg]
  · intro h; field_simp [z] at h; nlinarith [show 0 ≤ (n : ℚ) from n.cast_nonneg]
  · field_simp [x, y, z, h1, h2]; ring
  · field_simp [x, y, z, h1, h2, hD]; ring

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := λ n =>
    let k : ℚ := n + 2
    (-(k + 1) / k^2, -k * (k + 1), k / (k + 1)^2)
  have hf : ∀ n, let res := f n; (res.1 ≠ 1 ∧ res.2.1 ≠ 1 ∧ res.2.2 ≠ 1) ∧ res.1 * res.2.1 * res.2.2 = 1 ∧ res.1 ^ 2 / (res.1 - 1) ^ 2 + res.2.1 ^ 2 / (res.2.1 - 1) ^ 2 + res.2.2 ^ 2 / (res.2.2 - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    intro n
    let k : ℚ := n + 2
    have hk0 : k ≠ 0 := by linarith [show (n:ℚ) ≥ 0 from Nat.cast_nonneg n]
    have hk1 : k + 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith [show (n:ℚ) ≥ 0 from Nat.cast_nonneg n]
    have hx : (f n).1 ≠ 1 := by simp [f]; intro h; field_simp [hk0] at h; nlinarith
    have hy : (f n).2.1 ≠ 1 := by simp [f]; intro h; nlinarith
    have hz : (f n).2.2 ≠ 1 := by simp [f]; intro h; field_simp [hk1] at h; nlinarith
    refine ⟨⟨hx, hy, hz⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simp [f]; field_simp [hk0, hk1]; ring
    · simp [f]; field_simp [hx, hy, hz, hk0, hk1]; ring
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (s := Set.range f)
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    exact ⟨(f n).1, (f n).2.1, (f n).2.2, hf n, rfl⟩
  · have h_inj : Function.Injective f := by
      intro n m hnm; simp [f] at hnm
      have h := hnm.2.1; push_cast at h
      have : (n:ℚ)^2 + 5*(n:ℚ) = (m:ℚ)^2 + 5*(m:ℚ) := by linarith
      norm_cast at this; exact Nat.cast_inj.mp (by nlinarith)
    exact Set.Infinite.range h_inj

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := fun n =>
    let t : ℚ := n + 1
    (-(t + 1) / t ^ 2, -t * (t + 1), t / (t + 1) ^ 2)
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (s := Set.range f)
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    let t : ℚ := n + 1
    have ht : t ^ 2 + t + 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have hn : t ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have hp : t + 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    refine ⟨-(t + 1) / t ^ 2, -t * (t + 1), t / (t + 1) ^ 2, ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
    · field_simp; nlinarith
    · nlinarith
    · field_simp; nlinarith
    · field_simp; ring
    · have hx : -(t + 1) / t ^ 2 - 1 = -(t ^ 2 + t + 1) / t ^ 2 := by field_simp; ring
      have hy : -t * (t + 1) - 1 = -(t ^ 2 + t + 1) := by ring
      have hz : t / (t + 1) ^ 2 - 1 = -(t ^ 2 + t + 1) / (t + 1) ^ 2 := by field_simp; ring
      field_simp [hx, hy, hz]; ring
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro n m h
    simp [f] at h
    have h1 : (n : ℚ) = m := by nlinarith [h.2.1]
    exact Nat.cast_inj.1 h1

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := λ n =>
    ( -((n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2)), (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2)^2, -((n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1)^2) )
  have hf : Function.Injective f := by
    intro n m h; injection h with h1 _; simp only [neg_inj] at h1; norm_cast at h1; nlinarith
  apply Set.Infinite.mono _ (Set.infinite_range hf)
  rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, ne_eq]
  use -(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2), (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2)^2, -(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1)^2
  have h1 : (n + 1 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
  have h2 : (n + 2 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
  have h3 : (n : ℚ)^2 + 3 * n + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
  repeat' constructor
  · nlinarith
  · field_simp; nlinarith
  · field_simp; nlinarith
  · field_simp; ring
  · field_simp [h1, h2, h3]; ring
  · rfl

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := fun n =>
    ( -(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1 : ℚ)^2,
      -(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2 : ℚ),
      (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2 : ℚ)^2 )
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun n => ?_)
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro n m h; simp [f] at h; have h1 := h.2.1
    norm_cast at h1; nlinarith
  · simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    have h1 : (n : ℚ) ^ 2 + 3 * n + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have h2 : (n : ℚ) + 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have h3 : (n : ℚ) + 2 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    refine ⟨_, _, _, ⟨⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩, rfl⟩
    · intro h; field_simp [h2] at h; nlinarith
    · intro h; nlinarith
    · intro h; field_simp [h3] at h; nlinarith
    · field_simp [h2, h3]; ring
    · field_simp [h1, h2, h3]; ring

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := fun n => (-(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1 : ℚ)^2, -(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2), (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2 : ℚ)^2)
  have hf : Function.Injective f := by
    intro n m h; simp [f] at h; have h2 := h.2.1; simp at h2
    exact_mod_cast (by nlinarith : (n : ℚ) = m)
  apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective at hf
  refine Set.Infinite.mono ?_ hf
  rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩; simp
  let d1 : (n : ℚ) + 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith [Nat.cast_nonneg n]
  let d2 : (n : ℚ) + 2 ≠ 0 := by linarith [Nat.cast_nonneg n]
  let d3 : (n : ℚ)^2 + 3 * (n : ℚ) + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith [Nat.cast_nonneg n]
  refine ⟨-(n+2:ℚ)/(n+1)^2, -(n+1:ℚ)*(n+2), (n+1:ℚ)/(n+2)^2, ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
  · field_simp [d1]; nlinarith
  · nlinarith
  · field_simp [d2]; nlinarith
  · field_simp [d1, d2]; ring
  · have hx : (-(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1 : ℚ) ^ 2) / (-(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1 : ℚ) ^ 2 - 1) = (n + 2 : ℚ) / (n^2 + 3 * n + 3) := by field_simp [d1, d3]; ring
    have hy : (-(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2)) / (-(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2) - 1) = (n^2 + 3 * n + 2 : ℚ) / (n^2 + 3 * n + 3) := by field_simp [d3]; ring
    have hz : ((n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2 : ℚ) ^ 2) / ((n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2 : ℚ) ^ 2 - 1) = -(n + 1 : ℚ) / (n^2 + 3 * n + 3) := by field_simp [d2, d3]; ring
    rw [hx, hy, hz]; field_simp [d3]; ring

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := λ n =>
    let m : ℚ := n + 2
    (2 * (m - 1) / (m + 1)^2, -2 * (m + 1) / (m - 1)^2, (1 - m^2) / 4)
  apply Set.Infinite.of_injective f
  · intro n1 n2 h; simp [f] at h; nlinarith
  · intro n; simp [f]
    let m : ℚ := n + 2
    let x : ℚ := 2 * (m - 1) / (m + 1)^2
    let y : ℚ := -2 * (m + 1) / (m - 1)^2
    let z : ℚ := (1 - m^2) / 4
    have hx : x ≠ 1 := by field_simp [x]; nlinarith
    have hy : y ≠ 1 := by field_simp [y]; nlinarith
    have hz : z ≠ 1 := by field_simp [z]; nlinarith
    refine ⟨x, y, z, ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
    · field_simp [x, y, z]; ring
    · field_simp [sub_ne_zero.2 hx, sub_ne_zero.2 hy, sub_ne_zero.2 hz, x, y, z]; ring

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := fun n => (-(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) ^ 2, -(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2), (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2) ^ 2)
  have h_inj : Function.Injective f := by
    intro n m h
    simp only [f, Prod.mk.inj_iff] at h
    have h1 : (n : ℚ) = (m : ℚ) := by
      have h2 : (n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2) = (m + 1 : ℚ) * (m + 2) := by linarith [h.2.1]
      nlinarith
    exact Nat.cast_inj.mp h1
  apply Set.Infinite.mono _ (Set.infinite_range_of_injective h_inj)
  intro triple ⟨n, hn⟩
  subst hn
  simp only [mem_setOf_eq]
  let x : ℚ := -(n + 2) / (n + 1) ^ 2
  let y : ℚ := -(n + 1) * (n + 2)
  let z : ℚ := (n + 1) / (n + 2) ^ 2
  have h1 : (n : ℚ) + 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
  have h2 : (n : ℚ) + 2 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
  have h3 : (n : ℚ) ^ 2 + 3 * n + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
  have hx : x ≠ 1 := by field_simp [h1]; nlinarith
  have hy : y ≠ 1 := by nlinarith
  have hz : z ≠ 1 := by field_simp [h2]; nlinarith
  refine ⟨x, y, z, ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩, by field_simp [h1, h2]; ring, ?_, rfl⟩
  field_simp [hx, hy, hz, h1, h2, h3]
  ring

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := fun n => (-(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1 : ℚ)^2, -(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2 : ℚ), (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2 : ℚ)^2)
  have hf : Function.Injective f := by
    intro n m h; simp [f] at h
    have : (n : ℚ) ^ 2 + 3 * n = (m : ℚ) ^ 2 + 3 * m := by nlinarith [h.2.1]
    norm_cast at this; nlinarith
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (s := Set.range f)
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    use -(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1 : ℚ)^2, -(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2 : ℚ), (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2 : ℚ)^2
    repeat' constructor
    · intro h; field_simp at h; nlinarith
    · intro h; nlinarith
    · intro h; field_simp at h; nlinarith
    · field_simp; ring
    · field_simp; ring
    · rfl
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective hf

let f (n : ℕ) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := (-(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1)^2, -(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2), (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2)^2)
  have hf (n : ℕ) : let r := f n; (r.1 ≠ 1 ∧ r.2.1 ≠ 1 ∧ r.2.2 ≠ 1) ∧ r.1 * r.2.1 * r.2.2 = 1 ∧ r.1^2 / (r.1 - 1)^2 + r.2.1^2 / (r.2.1 - 1)^2 + r.2.2^2 / (r.2.2 - 1)^2 = 1 := by
    intro n; dsimp [f]
    have h1 : (n : ℚ) + 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have h2 : (n : ℚ) + 2 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have h3 : (n : ℚ)^2 + 3 * n + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    repeat' constructor <;> (field_simp [h1, h2, h3]; ring)
  refine Set.infinite_range_of_injective (f := f) ?_ |>.mono ?_
  · intro n m h; simp [f] at h; have : (n : ℚ) = m := by nlinarith; exact Nat.cast_inj.mp this
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩; exact ⟨(f n).1, (f n).2.1, (f n).2.2, hf n, rfl⟩

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := fun n =>
    ((n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2)^2, -(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1)^2, -(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2))
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun n => ?_) (Set.infinite_range_of_injective fun n m h => by simp [f] at h; nlinarith)
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  refine ⟨_, _, _, ⟨⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩, rfl⟩
  · have h : (n : ℚ)^2 + 3 * n + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    field_simp [h]; nlinarith
  · have h : (n : ℚ)^2 + 3 * n + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    field_simp [h]; nlinarith
  · nlinarith
  · field_simp; ring
  · have h : (n : ℚ)^2 + 3 * n + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    field_simp [h]; ring

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := fun n =>
    let k : ℚ := n + 1
    (-(k + 1) / k ^ 2, -k * (k + 1), k / (k + 1) ^ 2)
  have hf_inj : Function.Injective f := by
    intro n m h
    simp only [f, Prod.mk.injEq, neg_inj] at h
    have h1 := h.2.1
    norm_cast at h1
    nlinarith
  apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective hf_inj |>.mono
  rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  let k : ℚ := n + 1
  have hk : k ≠ 0 := by norm_num
  have hk' : k + 1 ≠ 0 := by norm_num
  have hq : k^2 + k + 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
  let x : ℚ := -(k + 1) / k ^ 2
  let y : ℚ := -k * (k + 1)
  let z : ℚ := k / (k + 1) ^ 2
  have hx : x ≠ 1 := by intro h; field_simp [hk] at h; nlinarith
  have hy : y ≠ 1 := by intro h; field_simp at h; nlinarith
  have hz : z ≠ 1 := by intro h; field_simp [hk'] at h; nlinarith
  use x, y, z
  refine ⟨⟨hx, hy, hz⟩, by field_simp [hk, hk']; ring, by field_simp [hx, hy, hz, hk, hk', hq]; ring, rfl⟩

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := λ n => (-(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1 : ℚ)^2, -((n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2 : ℚ)), (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2 : ℚ)^2)
  apply Set.Infinite.of_injective f
  · intro n m h
    simp only [f, Prod.mk.injEq, neg_inj] at h
    have : (n : ℚ) = m := by
      have h1 := h.2.1
      nlinarith
    assumption_mod_cast
  · intro n
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    let x : ℚ := -(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1 : ℚ)^2
    let y : ℚ := -((n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2 : ℚ))
    let z : ℚ := (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2 : ℚ)^2
    refine ⟨x, y, z, ⟨⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩, rfl⟩
    · field_simplify; nlinarith
    · nlinarith
    · field_simplify; nlinarith
    · field_simplify [x, y, z]; ring
    · field_simplify [x, y, z]; ring

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := fun n =>
    let k : ℚ := n + 1
    (-(k + 1) / k ^ 2, -k * (k + 1), k / (k + 1) ^ 2)
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (s := Set.range f)
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    let k : ℚ := n + 1
    have hk : k ^ 2 + k + 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have hk0 : k ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have hk1 : k + 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    refine ⟨-(k + 1) / k ^ 2, -k * (k + 1), k / (k + 1) ^ 2, ⟨⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩, rfl⟩
    · intro h; field_simp [hk0] at h; nlinarith
    · intro h; nlinarith
    · intro h; field_simp [hk1] at h; nlinarith
    · field_simp [hk0, hk1]; ring
    · field_simp [hk, hk0, hk1]; ring
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro n m h
    simp [f] at h
    apply (Nat.cast_inj (R := ℚ)).1
    have h2 := h.2.1
    nlinarith

let f : ℚ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := λ t ↦ (-(1 + t) / t^2, -(t + t^2), t / (1 + t)^2)
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (s := Set.range (λ n : ℕ ↦ f (n + 1)))
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    let t : ℚ := n + 1
    have ht0 : t ≠ 0 := by norm_cast; linarith
    have ht1 : t ≠ -1 := by norm_cast; linarith
    have hq : t^2 + t + 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith [show (2*t + 1)^2 + 3 = 4*(t^2 + t + 1) by ring]
    simp; refine ⟨-(1 + t) / t^2, -(t + t^2), t / (1 + t)^2, ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
    · intro h; field_simp [ht0] at h; nlinarith
    · intro h; nlinarith
    · intro h; field_simp [ht1] at h; nlinarith
    · field_simp [ht0, ht1]; ring
    · field_simp [ht0, ht1, hq]; ring
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro n m hnm
    simp [f] at hnm
    have : (n + 1) + (n + 1)^2 = (m + 1) + (m + 1)^2 := by
      have := hnm.2.1; norm_cast at this; linarith
    exact (StrictMono.injective (λ k ↦ k + k^2) (λ k ↦ by dsimp; linarith)) this

let f : ℚ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := λ m ↦ (-(1 + m) / m^2, -(m + m^2), m / (1 + m)^2)
  let s := { m : ℚ | m ≠ 0 ∧ m ≠ -1 }
  have h_inf : s.Infinite := (Set.infinite_univ ℚ).diff (Set.toFinite {0, -1 : ℚ})
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (s := f '' s)
  · rintro ⟨x1, y1, z1⟩ ⟨m, ⟨hm0, hm1⟩, hf⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    injection hf with hx hy hz
    have h_q : m^2 + m + 1 ≠ 0 := by
      intro h; have h1 : (2 * m + 1)^2 + 3 = 0 := by
        have : 4 * (m^2 + m + 1) = 0 := by rw [h]; ring
        linarith
      nlinarith
    have hx' : x1 ≠ 1 := by rw [← hx]; intro h; field_simp [hm0] at h; linarith [h_q]
    have hy' : y1 ≠ 1 := by rw [← hy]; intro h; linarith [h_q]
    have hz' : z1 ≠ 1 := by rw [← hz]; intro h; field_simp [hm1] at h; linarith [h_q]
    refine ⟨x1, y1, z1, ⟨hx', hy', hz'⟩, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
    · rw [← hx, ← hy, ← hz]; field_simp [hm0, hm1]; ring
    · rw [← hx, ← hy, ← hz]; field_simp [hx', hy', hz', hm0, hm1]; ring
  · apply Set.InjOn.infinite_image
    · intro m1 hm1 m2 hm2 h
      injection h with hx hy hz
      have : (m1 - m2) * (m1 + m2 + 1) = 0 := by linarith [hy]
      rcases mul_eq_zero.1 this with h_eq | h_sum
      · exact h_eq
      · exfalso
        have h_eq : m2 = -1 - m1 := by linarith
        have : (m1 + 1) * (2 * m1^2 + m1 + 1) = 0 := by
          field_simp [hm1.1, hm1.2] at hx; rw [h_eq] at hx; ring_nf at hx; exact hx
        rcases mul_eq_zero.1 this with h_neg1 | h_quad
        · exact hm1.2 h_neg1
        · have : (4 * m1 + 1)^2 + 7 = 0 := by nlinarith [h_quad]
          nlinarith
    · exact h_inf

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := fun n =>
    ( - (n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1)^2, - (n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2), (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2)^2 )
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (Set.range_subset_iff.mpr ?)
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro n m h; simp [f, Prod.mk.injEq] at h; apply Nat.cast_inj.mp; nlinarith
  · intro n; simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    refine ⟨- (n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1)^2, - (n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2), (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2)^2, ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
    · field_simp; nlinarith
    · nlinarith
    · field_simp; nlinarith
    · field_simp; ring
    · field_simp; ring

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := fun n => (-(n + 1) * (n + 2), -(n + 2) / (n + 1)^2, (n + 1) / (n + 2)^2)
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (s := Set.range f)
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    use -(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2), -(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1)^2, (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2)^2
    have h1 : (n + 1 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by norm_cast; linarith
    have h2 : (n + 2 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by norm_cast; linarith
    have hd : (n : ℚ)^2 + 3 * n + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have hx : -(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2) - 1 = -(n^2 + 3 * n + 3) := by ring
    have hy : -(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1)^2 - 1 = -(n^2 + 3 * n + 3) / (n + 1)^2 := by field_simp; ring
    have hz : (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2)^2 - 1 = -(n^2 + 3 * n + 3) / (n + 2)^2 := by field_simp; ring
    refine ⟨⟨by nlinarith, by intro h; field_simp at h; nlinarith, by intro h; field_simp at h; nlinarith⟩,
            by field_simp; ring, by field_simp [hx, hy, hz, hd, h1, h2]; ring, rfl⟩
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro n1 n2 h; simp [f] at h
    have h1 := (Prod.ext_iff.1 h).1
    norm_cast at h1; nlinarith

apply Set.Infinite.mono (s := Set.range (fun n : ℕ =>
    ( -((n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1 : ℚ) ^ 2),
      -((n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2 : ℚ)),
      ((n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2 : ℚ) ^ 2) )))
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    use -(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1 : ℚ) ^ 2, -(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2 : ℚ), (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2 : ℚ) ^ 2
    have hn : (n : ℚ) ≥ 0 := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le n)
    have h1 : (n : ℚ) + 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith
    have h2 : (n : ℚ) + 2 ≠ 0 := by linarith
    repeat' constructor
    · field_simp [h1]; nlinarith
    · nlinarith
    · field_simp [h2]; nlinarith
    · field_simp [h1, h2]; ring
    · have hx1 : -(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1 : ℚ) ^ 2 - 1 ≠ 0 := by field_simp [h1]; nlinarith
      have hy1 : -((n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2 : ℚ)) - 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
      have hz1 : (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2 : ℚ) ^ 2 - 1 ≠ 0 := by field_simp [h2]; nlinarith
      field_simp [h1, h2, hx1, hy1, hz1]; ring
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro n m h
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq, neg_inj] at h
    have h_eq : ((n : ℚ) + 1) * ((n : ℚ) + 2) = ((m : ℚ) + 1) * ((m : ℚ) + 2) := h.2.1
    have : (n : ℚ) = (m : ℚ) := by nlinarith
    exact_mod_cast this

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := λ n =>
    let t : ℚ := n + 2
    (-(t + 1) / t ^ 2, -t * (t + 1), t / (t + 1) ^ 2)
  have hf : ∀ n, f n ∈ { x | ∃ x_1 y z, ∃ (_ : x_1 ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) (_ : x_1 * y * z = 1) (_ : x_1 ^ 2 / (x_1 - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1), (x_1, y, z) = x } := by
    intro n; let t : ℚ := n + 2
    have ht : 0 < t := by simp [t]; linarith
    have ht1 : 0 < t + 1 := by linarith
    have hD : 0 < t^2 + t + 1 := by nlinarith
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]; use -(t + 1) / t ^ 2, -t * (t + 1), t / (t + 1) ^ 2
    repeat' constructor
    all_goals (field_simp [ht.ne', ht1.ne', hD.ne']; try ring; try nlinarith)
    simp [f, t]
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (Set.range_subset_iff.mpr hf)
  apply Set.Infinite.range_of_injective
  intro n m h; simp [f] at h
  have h_eq : (n + 2 : ℚ) * (n + 3) = (m + 2 : ℚ) * (m + 3) := by
    have := h.2.1; linarith
  norm_cast at h_eq
  have h_mono : StrictMono (λ n : ℕ => (n + 2) * (n + 3)) := by
    intro n m hnm; apply Nat.mul_lt_mul <;> linarith
  exact h_mono.injective h_eq

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := λ n => (-(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2), (n + 1) / (n + 2)^2, -(n + 2) / (n + 1)^2)
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (s := Set.range f)
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    have h1 : (n : ℚ) + 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith [Nat.cast_nonneg n]
    have h2 : (n : ℚ) + 2 ≠ 0 := by linarith [Nat.cast_nonneg n]
    have h3 : (n : ℚ)^2 + 3*n + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith [Nat.cast_nonneg n]
    refine ⟨_, _, _, ⟨⟨by nlinarith [Nat.cast_nonneg n], ?_, by nlinarith [Nat.cast_nonneg n]⟩, by field_simp; ring, ?_⟩, rfl⟩
    · simp [div_eq_one_iff (by nlinarith [Nat.cast_nonneg n])]; nlinarith [Nat.cast_nonneg n]
    · have hx : (-(n + 1 : ℚ) * (n + 2)) - 1 = -(n^2 + 3*n + 3) := by ring
      have hy : ((n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2)^2) - 1 = -(n^2 + 3*n + 3) / (n + 2)^2 := by field_simp; ring
      have hz : (-(n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1)^2) - 1 = -(n^2 + 3*n + 3) / (n + 1)^2 := by field_simp; ring
      field_simp [hx, hy, hz, h1, h2, h3]; ring
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro n m h
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq, neg_inj] at h
    have h1 := h.1
    have : (n : ℚ) = m := by nlinarith [h1, Nat.cast_nonneg n, Nat.cast_nonneg m]
    exact_mod_cast this

apply Set.Infinite.mono (Set.range_subset_iff.mpr fun n ↦ ?_) (Set.infinite_range_of_injective ?_)
  · let nq := (n : ℚ)
    have h1 : nq + 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have h2 : nq + 2 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have h3 : nq ^ 2 + 3 * nq + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    use -(nq + 2) / (nq + 1) ^ 2, -(nq + 1) * (nq + 2), (nq + 1) / (nq + 2) ^ 2
    refine ⟨⟨by intro h; field_simp [h1] at h; nlinarith, by intro h; nlinarith,
             by intro h; field_simp [h2] at h; nlinarith⟩,
            by field_simp [h1, h2]; ring, by field_simp [h1, h2, h3]; ring, rfl⟩
  · intro n m h; simp only [neg_inj, Prod.mk.injEq] at h; have h1 := h.2.1
    have : (n : ℚ) = m := by nlinarith
    exact Nat.cast_inj.mp this
